nodes.label: Input Embed + PosEnc
nodes.summary: Token embeddings scaled by √d_model, summed with fixed sinusoidal positional encodings; feeds both stacks.

nodes.label: Encoder Stack (N=6)
nodes.summary: Six identical layers; each has self-attention and FFN sublayers, both wrapped in residual + LayerNorm.

nodes.label: Multi-Head Attention
nodes.summary: h=8 parallel scaled dot-product attention heads; reused as encoder self-attention, masked decoder self-attent…

nodes.label: Decoder Stack (N=6)
nodes.summary: Six identical layers with masked self-attention, encoder-decoder attention, and FFN; masking preserves auto-r…

nodes.label: Linear + Softmax
nodes.summary: Tied-weight linear projection to vocab logits, then softmax over next-token distribution.
